title: Apply mount add/remove change to a list of mounts
prompt_goal: Design pure behavior to apply a mount change to a list of mounts. A Mount has fields source Text and target Text. A Change has fields op Text (either add or remove) and entry Mount. Return a new list of mounts: for add, include entry if not present; for remove, drop any existing mount matching entry by source and target. Preserve other mounts.
public_forbidden: Do not use storage, network, time, randomness, filesystem, or external services.
Do not hardcode verifier cases or special-case concrete input values.
Do not print or emit observable effects.
